_description: Externalized weights + rubrics for compare_services. Replaces the hardcoded fit_rank dict that used to live in server.py. Each criterion scores 0..1; the engine normalizes weights to sum to 1.

fit._note: Curated suitability rank, 0..1. Replaces the old magic fit_rank dict.

ops_burden._note: Source field is 1 (managed) .. 5 (heavy). Inverted + normalized so lower burden scores higher.

latency_fit._note: Scored against the customer's downtime/latency posture. base scores by latency_class; up-weighted when a low-latency need is declared.
